name: Cash Store
description_short: Cash Store Frisco, Texas — Cash Store offers installment loans and prepaid cards at physical locations, with same-day funding available after in-store a...
description_long:
Cash Store is a storefront lender operating physical retail locations, including one in Houston, Texas at 19734 Tomball Parkway. The company has been in the consumer lending space serving customers who need quick access to funds. Their Houston location maintains a 4.9-star Google rating based on 212 customer reviews, with customers frequently praising specific staff members for professionalism and helpful service.

Cash Store's primary offering is installment loans—unsecured personal loans repaid over a fixed schedule that can be used for major purchases, bill consolidation, or unexpected expenses. They also offer Netspend Prepaid Mastercard products and retail refinancing/reloading options for existing customers. The application process involves online pre-qualification, in-person document submission at a retail location, underwriting review, and same-day funding upon approval.

Cash Store distinguishes itself through its retail-first model with face-to-face customer service and rapid funding timelines. The company does not require perfect credit and explicitly states that bad or no credit won't automatically disqualify applicants. Their streamlined three-step process (pre-qualify online, gather documents, complete in-store application) is designed for speed. Customer reviews consistently highlight the professionalism and helpfulness of store staff, particularly named employees.

A key caveat is that specific loan terms, APR ranges, and maximum loan amounts are not disclosed on this location page, making it impossible to assess affordability compared to alternatives. The website indicates this is a retail-based model requiring in-person visits for final approval and funding, which may be inconvenient for some borrowers. While same-day funding is promised upon approval, actual rates and terms depend on individual underwriting and are not transparent upfront.

As a financial institution, this lender competes with both traditional banks and newer fintech personal loan lenders in the consumer lending space. Borrowers seeking personal loans for bad credit may find more flexible terms through online lenders, while those focused on simplifying payments may benefit from debt consolidation loans with fixed rates. For credit building, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured paths to improvement. Credit monitoring services provide ongoing visibility into credit health, and credit counseling through nonprofit agencies can help consumers create sustainable budgeting plans. Many of these lenders offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments over 12 to 60 months, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
pros: Same-day funding available after in-store approval and loan origination
No strict credit requirements—company states bad or no credit won't automatically disqualify applicants
Streamlined 3-step process: online pre-qualification, document gathering, in-store completion
High customer satisfaction with 4.9-star Google rating across 212 reviews
Physical retail locations with in-person staff for guidance and questions
Minimal pre-qualification requirements (phone number, ID, proof of income, active checking account)
Flexible loan uses including purchases, consolidation, and emergency expenses
cons: APR, rate ranges, and maximum loan amounts not disclosed on website—borrowers cannot compare terms upfront
Requires in-person visit to physical location for final application and funding, limiting accessibility
Unsecured personal loan structure typically carries higher rates than secured alternatives
Website provides no information on typical approval timelines or average loan amounts
Terms and rates determined solely through individual underwriting with no transparency on approval criteria
best_for: Borrowers with fair or poor credit seeking quick access to cash without bank relationships
Consumers needing same-day or next-day funding for emergency expenses or planned purchases
Individuals preferring face-to-face application support and in-store guidance
diagnosis: Cash Store is best for consumers with fair or poor credit who need quick installment loans with same-day funding and prefer in-person service. The primary caveat is the complete lack of transparency around APR, rates, and loan terms—borrowers cannot compare this lender to alternatives before visiting in person, making it difficult to assess whether their loan is competitively priced.
services: Unsecured installment loans with fixed repayment schedules
Same-day funding upon approval and loan agreement origination
Retail customer refinancing and reloading of existing installment loans
Document upload capability for application support
In-store customer service and loan counseling
Retail Remote Refi & Reload services for existing customers
